body:
## Summary
- redesign the lobby page and move page-specific styles into LobbyPage.css
- redesign the leaderboard page and move page-specific styles into LeaderboardPage.css
- adjust navbar authenticated actions to match the new dashboard flow
- remove navbar dead code that was causing lint noise in this PR scope

## Verification
- npx oxlint src/components/layout/Navbar.jsx src/pages/LobbyPage.jsx src/pages/LeaderboardPage.jsx src/styles/LobbyPage.css src/styles/LeaderboardPage.css
- npm run build

## Notes
- npm run lint still reports pre-existing issues outside this PR scope
title: feat(frontend): refresh lobby and leaderboard UX
